meaning: n.铜绿,碱性碳酸铜,碱性醋酸铜
examples: His pockets are full of red lead and verdigris.
Verdigris has spread all over that abandoned copper pot.
Encrusted with verdigris, two statues of the "liver bird", the city's symbol, sit atop a riverside building.
On July 2 the Verdigris River crested at 30.4 feet, flooding Coffeyville and causing the refinery to shut down.
